aiBriefing.summary: SriMandir (₹2Cr/month merchant) formally escalated repeated P0 failures and threatened to pause GoKwik + switch to Razorpay — Monday 3PM call with Pranav. CEO flagged AI Calling as urgent ('important to get this going ppl'). 2 new Jira finance approvals pending (Jade Blue ₹5K, Nathabit FC CN). KwikAgents PRD has TODAY deadlines for pilot merchant naming and table validation. 8 people are waiting on you — Rahul Bareja and Mahima Jain for 9 days each.
highlights: 🔴 SRIMANDIR ESCALATION: ₹2Cr/month merchant threatening to pause GoKwik + seek penalties. Monday 3-4PM call — prep P0 SLA remediation plan.
🔴 AI CALLING: CEO Chirag flagged 'important to get this going.' No confirmed production test yet. Get Nisheeth/Heli on a concrete go-live plan.
🔴 CONFLUENCE: KwikAgents PRD has TODAY (Apr 7) deadlines — name pilot merchants+CSMs, validate table-agent mappings. Also Claude API budget ($2.5K/month) approval due Apr 10.
🟡 CONSCIOUS CHEMIST: Merchant following up on addendum revision (9 days past your team's commitment). Push Sanjana Singh to close today.
🟡 PEOPLE: 8 people waiting — Rahul Bareja (Netcore connect, 9d), Mahima Jain (interview feedback, 9d), Mrigank (Goals, 5d).
🟡 FINANCE: 2 new approvals (Jade Blue ₹5K, Nathabit FC CN) + TO-66065 pricing recovery still needs your input (28 days stale).
